title: draba breweri var. cana
intro: Draba breweri var. cana is a rare variety of the Draba breweri plant, a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae), commonly found in the western United States. The medicinal properties of Draba breweri var. cana lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are thought to be derived from its high concentration of glucosinolates. The health benefits associated with this plant include the potential treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent to reduce pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of Draba breweri var. cana typically involve drying and powdering the plant material, which can then be used as a topical ointment or added to teas and infusions for medicinal purposes.
